result.summary: Found 3 major issues: truncated navigation text, truncated game titles on cards, and text overflow problems in the game grid sections.

issues.description: Navigation tab text is truncated - 'Hot Gar' appears instead of the complete 'Hot Games' text
issues.suggestion: Adjust the navigation container width or use responsive breakpoints to ensure full text is visible, or implement text wrapping/truncation with ellipsis (...) if space is limited

issues.description: Game card titles are truncated in the exclusive games section - 'MAGNIFI' and 'MONC MM' appear to be cut off mid-word
issues.suggestion: Ensure game title text containers have sufficient height/width, or implement proper text truncation with ellipsis. Consider using text overflow properties (overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis;)

issues.description: Game card text in both 'Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections appears to have inconsistent overflow handling, with some titles partially visible
issues.suggestion: Apply consistent text overflow handling across all game cards with proper CSS (text-overflow: ellipsis, white-space: nowrap, overflow: hidden) and ensure adequate padding/margins
